title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libdnf bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for libdnf is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: A Library providing simplified C and Python API to libsolv.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): packagekit crashes when 2 public keys are not usable, due to a libdnf bug (JIRA:RHEL-135601)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems

fixes.description: packagekit crashes when 2 public keys are not usable, due to a libdnf bug

full_text:
An update for libdnf is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

A Library providing simplified C and Python API to libsolv.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): packagekit crashes when 2 public keys are not usable, due to a libdnf bug (JIRA:RHEL-135601)
